scripts.bundle: bun run bundle:macos && bun run bundle:linux && bun run bundle:windows
scripts.bundle:macos: rustup target add x86_64-apple-darwin aarch64-apple-darwin && tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin && rm -rf dist/macos && mkdir -p dist/macos && cp -R src-tauri/target/universal-apple-darwin/release/bundle/macos src-tauri/target/universal-apple-darwin/release/bundle/dmg dist/macos
scripts.bundle:linux: docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t grindr-devtool-bundle-linux -f docker/bundle-linux.Dockerfile docker && docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 -v "$PWD":/app -v grindr-devtool-bundle-linux-node:/app/node_modules -v grindr-devtool-bundle-linux-build:/build -v grindr-devtool-bundle-cargo:/usr/local/cargo/registry grindr-devtool-bundle-linux
scripts.bundle:windows: docker build -t grindr-devtool-bundle-windows -f docker/bundle-windows.Dockerfile docker && docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app -v grindr-devtool-bundle-windows-node:/app/node_modules -v grindr-devtool-bundle-windows-build:/build -v grindr-devtool-bundle-cargo:/usr/local/cargo/registry grindr-devtool-bundle-windows
